instruction:
Suppose that $\Omega_1$ and $\Omega_2$ are two circles with radii $9$ and $16$ , respectively, and that they are externally tangent at $P$ . A common external tangent $\ell$ meets $\Omega_1$ at $X$ and $\Omega_2$ at $Y$ . $\overleftrightarrow{XP}$ meets $\Omega_2$ again at $W$ , and $\overleftrightarrow{YP}$ meets $\Omega_1$ again at $Z$ . If $WZ$ can be expressed as $a \sqrt b$ for positive integers $a$ and $b$ with $b$ squarefree, compute $a+ b$ .

Options:
A. 194
B. 195
C. 190
D. 198
E. 196
F. 191
G. 192
H. 199
I. 193
J. 197
